summary: Comprehensive testing completed for new responsive and selection features. Backend: 16/16 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 12 test scenarios passed including responsive layouts and question selection for PDF feature.
critical_code_review_comments: All responsive logic implemented correctly using useWindowDimensions
Dashboard 2x2 grid using FlatList with numColumns=2 works perfectly
Question selection state management with selectedForPdf working correctly
PDF FAB appears/disappears based on selection count with proper positioning
Backend filtering by selected_question_ids implemented correctly
All testID attributes present for automated testing
Responsive layouts working on mobile (390x844) and tablet (768x1024)
seed_data_creation: Using existing 12 JVN questions from previous iteration
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features fully functional. Responsive layouts working perfectly on mobile and tablet. Question selection for PDF feature working as expected with proper state management. Backend correctly filters questions by selected_question_ids. All 6 subjects display in 2x2 grid layout.

new_tests: ✓ POST /api/generate-pdf with empty selected_question_ids returns all questions

tests: ✓ Login page responsive on mobile (390x844) - form centered, all fields visible
✓ Login page responsive on tablet (768x1024) - form max-width constraint applied
✓ Dashboard shows all 6 subjects in 2x2 grid on mobile
✓ Dashboard shows all 6 subjects in 2x2 grid on tablet
✓ Questions screen 'Select for PDF' button present on each question
✓ Clicking 'Select for PDF' toggles to 'Selected' state
✓ PDF FAB appears at bottom-right after selecting questions
✓ PDF FAB shows correct count: PDF (1) → PDF (2) → PDF (3)
✓ Clicking PDF FAB navigates to pdf-export with selectedIds param
✓ PDF export page shows selected count badge '3 Selected Questions'
✓ PDF export button shows 'Download PDF (3 Qs)'
✓ Deselection toggles state back and updates FAB count

mobile_390x844.login_page: ✓ Form centered, no overflow, all elements visible
mobile_390x844.dashboard: ✓ 2x2 grid displayed correctly with all 6 subjects
mobile_390x844.questions_screen: ✓ Selection feature working, FAB positioned correctly
mobile_390x844.pdf_export: ✓ Content displayed properly with selected count

selection_feature_verification.select_button: ✓ Present on each question with testID='select-for-pdf-btn'
selection_feature_verification.visual_feedback: ✓ Purple background and checkmark icon when selected
selection_feature_verification.fab_count: ✓ Count updates correctly: PDF (1), PDF (2), PDF (3)
selection_feature_verification.navigation: ✓ FAB navigates to pdf-export with selectedIds JSON param
